LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AND ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE'S RENEWED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO LOS ANGELES AND REQUEST FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL - MOTION IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 396(B) AND 397(A) AND GOVERNMENT CODE 12965(B). JUDGE SOHIGIAN DID NOT RULE ON THE MERITS OF A MOTION INVOKING SECTION 12965(B) AND THUS THIS MOTION IS NOT SEEKING RECONSIDERATION. DEFENDANTS HAVE SHOWN THAT VENUE IS IMPROPER IN THIS COUNTY PER SECTION 12965(B). ALL REQUESTS FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES ARE DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR # 7077

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Off Calendar

Renewed Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue And Request For An Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs Against Plaintiff'S Counsel; Points And Authorities, Declarations Of Jill A Porcaro And Denise Held In Support; Appendix Of Non Published Federal Authority
Off Calendar Jan-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. K. L. MYLES OF KNAPP PETERSEN CLARKE, TEL. NO. (818) 547-5060 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. JEFFREY A. WORTMAN OF THE SEYFARTH/SHAW LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 270-9635 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AND ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE'S Renewed Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue to Los Angeles And Request For An Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs Against Plaintiff'S Counsel - Motion is Granted pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 396(b) and 397(a) and Government Code 12965(b). Judge Sohigian did not rule on the merits of a motion invoking section 12965(b) and thus this motion is not seeking reconsideration. Defendants have shown that venue is improper in this county per section 12965(b). All requests for attorney's fees are denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion For Transfer Of Case And Coordination Of Action
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA, ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE'S MOTION FOR TRANSFER OF CASE AND COORDINATION OF ACTION.
Appearances: Jeffrey A. Wortman of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (213.270.9600) for defendants and moving parties; K.L. Myles of Knapp Petersen Clarke (818.547.5000) for plaintiff and responding party.
Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party failed to provide courtesy copies. The court indicated this ruling is without prejudice. Order signed. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
